title: Datadog (DDOG) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Datadog Q3 2023 Earnings Call Summary. Financial Performance: Datadog delivered strong Q3 2023 results with revenue of 548 million representing 25 percent year-over-year growth and exceeding guidance. The company ended the quarter with approximately 26,800 customers up from 22,200 in the prior year. Key Metrics: Free cash flow 138 million with 25 percent margin. Gross margin 82.3 percent up from 81.3 percent in Q2. Operating margin 24 percent. Net revenue retention: Slightly below 120 percent. Product Milestones: Three observability pillars achieved significant ARR milestones with Infrastructure monitoring exceeding 1 billion, APM suite surpassing 500 million, and Log management exceeding 500 million. Platform adoption strengthened with 82 percent of customers using multiple products while 46 percent adopted four or more products. Business Drivers: Management highlighted moderating customer optimization trends with usage growth in existing customers improving compared to Q2. New logo bookings remained robust with record numbers of deals exceeding 100,000 in annual commitments. AI and Future Growth: AI-native customers contributed approximately 2.5 percent of ARR.
